caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual map displayed on the screen. The map is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and pathways between the ideas. A presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, is explaining the content while navigating through the map. At one point, an image of a person is highlighted, possibly indicating a key figure or theorist related to the topic being discussed. The overall focus seems to be on understanding and applying systems thinking to various aspects of life and society.
